title: viola suavis var. segobricensis
intro: Viola suavis var. segobricensis, also known as Sweet Wood Violet, is a fragrant and perennial herb belonging to the violet family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola suavis var. segobricensis include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress levels, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
